description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine Docker image. Define a pages job named "pages" that runs in the pages stage to generate documentation with Doxygen. In its script run "apk update && apk add doxygen", then "doxygen doxygen/Doxyfile", and finally move the generated HTML with "mv doxygen/documentation/html/ public/". Publish the "public/" directory as a pages artifact and configure the job to run only on the master branch, deploying the result to GitLab Pages.
